particulars.description: As a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities, the mortgagor with full title guarantee charges to the lender a first legal mortgage over land at flat 1 first floor, 49 marchmont street, london, england, WC1N 1AP and a first fixed charge. For more details please refer to the instrument.

As a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities, the mortgagor with full title guarantee charges to the lender a first legal mortgage over land at flat 3, 49 marchmont street, london, england, WC1N 1AP and a first fixed charge. For more details please refer to the instrument.

As a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities, the mortgagor with full title guarantee charges to the lender a first legal mortgage over land at flat 2, 49 marchmont street, london, england, WC1N 1AP and a first fixed charge. For more details please refer to the instrument.
